headline: Enterprise-readiness guidance, not compliance certification.

target.name: UnClick
target.surface: repo, docs, workflow, and public proof surfaces

wording_notice: This report describes readiness indicators and evidence alignment. It is not a compliance certification, SOC report, ISO audit, legal opinion, or security attestation.

summary.headline: EnterprisePass has a product boundary and seed artifact. Automated evidence checks are not live yet.

categories.name: Code maintainability
categories.summary: Will review tests, build, lint, type safety, structure, oversized files, and brittle code signals.

categories.name: Secure development
categories.summary: Will review security policy, dependency checks, branch protection evidence, and secret-scanning signals.

categories.name: Evidence over claims
categories.summary: Will flag bold claims that do not point to docs, tests, PRs, workflow runs, or public receipts.

categories.name: Documentation quality
categories.summary: Will review README, ADRs, runbooks, architecture notes, onboarding, and operating docs.

categories.name: Credential and environment hygiene
categories.summary: Will review ownership, used-by mapping, staleness, rotation notes, and safe evidence from RotatePass or Connections.

categories.name: Investor readiness
categories.summary: Will review license, bus-factor signals, operational discipline, and audit trail evidence.

categories.name: AI governance readiness
categories.summary: Will review model/provider inventory, human oversight, data/source notes, and AI-system evidence where applicable.

next_actions: Build the Phase 0 static repo/docs scanner.
Link findings to existing TestPass, SecurityPass, SlopPass, LegalPass, RotatePass, and XPass receipts.
Render this JSON as a simple EnterprisePass report page only after evidence checks are available.
Keep all public copy in readiness language and avoid compliance-certification claims.

evidence.summary: Product boundary: readiness report, not certification.
EnterprisePass is listed as a scoped Pass-family product under XPass.
